{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Lowgold participants
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There are five hundred and fifty-two [[Lowgold participants]] in the application process.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
